subcodes.first_line: The Pen of the Wronged One beareth witness unto the oneness of the Almighty God, and testifieth that Hájí [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم مظلوم شهادت میدهد بر یکتائی خداوند توانا و گواهی میدهد بر اینکه حاجی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
